_source: Static slot-5 SCD decode (T10, edit_spawn.py). SPAWN = op 0x1a; operands = the preceding op-0x05 push run. Each push: [0]=0x05,[1]=mode,[2:4]=value(LE). Editable = mode-0 (literal) only; value_off = blob byte offset of the 2-byte word (decompressed-blob space, == 0x5e0000-based VA - 0x5e0000). Mirrors door-graph.json.
_fields: TYPE@block+0x20 (species, 1:1 only for hardcoded TYPEs; 0x10=generic, base is global), posX@+0x1c, posY@+0x18, posZ@+0x14, SLOT@+0x24, MODEL_BASE@+0x0c (usually global), VARIANT@+0x08 (raptor tier/.TEX nibble -> [actor+0x10C]; valid 0-6, RAPTOR-TIER-RE.md).
